description_raw_zh: 被击杀时，召唤一个全新的巨斧机器人。

name: Storm
description: Whenever you play a Power, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].
description_zh: 你每打出一张能力牌，就[gold]生成[/gold][blue][Amount][/blue]个[gold]闪电充能球[/gold]。
description_raw: Whenever you play a Power, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].
description_raw_zh: 你每打出一张能力牌，就[gold]生成[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]个[gold]闪电充能球[/gold]。

name: Strangle
description: Whenever you play a card this turn, [On Player] [blue][Amount][/blue] HP.
description_zh: 本回合，你每次打出牌时，[On Player][blue][Amount][/blue]点生命。
description_raw: Whenever you play a card this turn, {OnPlayer:you lose|this enemy loses} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
description_raw_zh: 本回合，你每次打出牌时，{OnPlayer:自身失去|这名敌人失去}[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点生命。

name: Stratagem
description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose [blue][Amount][/blue] cards from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
description_zh: 你每次洗牌[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]时，从中选择[blue][Amount][/blue]张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
description_raw: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
description_raw_zh: 你每次洗牌[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]时，从中选择[blue]{Amount}[/blue]张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。

name: Strength
description: [Amount] attack damage by [blue][Amount][/blue].
description_zh: [Amount]攻击牌造成的伤害值[blue][Amount][/blue]点。
description_raw: {Amount:cond:<0?Decreases|Increases} attack damage by [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue].
description_raw_zh: {Amount:cond:<0?减少|增加}攻击牌造成的伤害值[blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue]点。

name: Subroutine
description: Whenever you play a Power, gain [blue][Amount][/blue] [energy:1].
description_zh: 你每次打出能力牌时，都获得[blue][Amount][/blue][energy:1]。
description_raw: Whenever you play a Power, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:energyIcons()}.
description_raw_zh: 你每次打出能力牌时，都获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]{Amount:energyIcons()}。

name: Suck
description: Whenever [gold][Owner Name][/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
description_zh: [gold][Owner Name][/gold]每次造成未被格挡的伤害时，都会获得[blue][Amount][/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
description_raw: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
description_raw_zh: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]每次造成未被格挡的伤害时，都会获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。

name: Summon Next Turn
description: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue][Amount][/blue].
description_zh: 在你的下回合开始时，[gold]召唤[/gold][blue][Amount][/blue]。
description_raw: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
description_raw_zh: 在你的下回合开始时，[gold]召唤[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]。

name: Surprise
description: Something is off about this creature...
description_zh: 这个生物有点不太对劲……
description_raw_zh: 这个生物有点不太对劲……

name: Surrounded
description: Receive [blue]50%[/blue] more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.
description_zh: 被从后方攻击时受到的伤害增加[blue]50%[/blue]。使用有目标的卡牌或药水来改变你的朝向。
description_raw_zh: 被从后方攻击时受到的伤害增加[blue]50%[/blue]。使用有目标的卡牌或药水来改变你的朝向。

name: Swipe
description: Upon killing this enemy, the stolen card is returned.
description_zh: 击杀这名敌人时，会取回被偷走的卡牌。
description_raw_zh: 击杀这名敌人时，会取回被偷走的卡牌。

name: Sword Sage
description: Increase the cost of [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] by [blue][Amount][/blue]. [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] now hits [blue][Amount][/blue] additional times.
description_zh: [gold]君王之剑[/gold]的耗能增加[blue][Amount][/blue]。[gold]君王之剑[/gold]现在额外命中[blue][Amount][/blue]次。
description_raw: Increase the cost of [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] by [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] now hits [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional {Amount:plural:time|times}.
description_raw_zh: [gold]君王之剑[/gold]的耗能增加[blue]{Amount}[/blue]。[gold]君王之剑[/gold]现在额外命中[blue]{Amount}[/blue]次。

name: Tag Team
description: The next Attack another player plays on the enemy is played an extra time.
description_zh: 另一名玩家对该敌人的下一张攻击牌会多打出一次。
description_raw_zh: 另一名玩家对该敌人的下一张攻击牌会多打出一次。

name: Tangled
description: Attacks cost an additional [energy:1] for 2 turns.
description_zh: [Amount]回合内，攻击牌的[energy:1]费用增加[blue]1[/blue]。
description_raw: Attacks cost an additional {Amount:energyIcons()} {Amount:plural:this turn|for {} turns}.
description_raw_zh: {Amount}回合内，攻击牌的{Amount:energyIcons()}费用增加[blue]1[/blue]。

name: Tank
description: Take double damage from enemies. Allies take half damage from enemies.
description_zh: 自身受到敌人伤害加倍。盟友受到敌人伤害减半。
description_raw_zh: 自身受到敌人伤害加倍。盟友受到敌人伤害减半。

name: TemporaryDexterityPower

description_raw: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] until the end of this turn.
description_raw_zh: 在本回合结束前获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。

name: TemporaryFocusPower

description: If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.
description_zh: 如果你在这场战斗中受到未被格挡的攻击伤害，则立即死亡。
description_raw_zh: 如果你在这场战斗中受到未被格挡的攻击伤害，则立即死亡。
